recommendations.title: Finders Keepers
recommendations.overview: A haunted doll teaches one little girl why children shouldn't play with undead things.

recommendations.title: The Awakening
recommendations.overview: In post–War England, a writer and sometime-ghost hunter investigates a reported haunting at a boys boarding school.

recommendations.title: Altar
recommendations.overview: A young family find themselves in serious danger when they move to an isolated haunted house in the Yorkshire Moors.

recommendations.title: The Innocents
recommendations.overview: A young governess for two children becomes convinced that the house and grounds are haunted by ghosts and that the children are being possessed.

recommendations.title: Kill, Baby... Kill!
recommendations.overview: A 20th century European village is haunted by the ghost of a murderous little girl.

recommendations.title: The Outsider
recommendations.overview: A former American G.I. joins a yakuza family after his release from prison in post-World War II Osaka.

recommendations.title: Shutter
recommendations.overview: When Jane and Tun run over a girl in a car accident, they speed away immediately from the crime scene. However, Tun, a photographer, soon discovers strange shadows in his photos, which unsettles them.

recommendations.title: The Little Stranger
recommendations.overview: In a dusty post-war summer in rural Warwickshire, a doctor is called to a patient at lonely Hundreds Hall. Home to the Ayres family for over two centuries, the Georgian house is now in decline. But are the Ayreses haunted by something more sinister t

recommendations.title: Birth/Rebirth
recommendations.overview: A single mother and a childless morgue technician are bound together by their relationship to a little girl they have reanimated from the dead.

recommendations.title: In the Line of Fire
